overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character walking through a foggy gothic castle courtyard at night, approaching a large ornate door. The scene features atmospheric lighting from ground lanterns and lit windows, with the camera following the character's movement from the open courtyard toward the building entrance.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the foggy courtyard toward the central fountain

tall dark stone wall with vertical slit windows
circular stone fountain surrounded by ground lanterns
gothic arched windows emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy gothic courtyard at night, with tall stone walls on both sides and a central fountain visible in the distance. The camera moves forward through the cobblestone courtyard, passing ground lanterns that cast warm pools of light, while the player character becomes visible ahead moving toward the fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard perimeter path with tower view

events.description: turning left toward building facade, night sky becomes visible above tower
transitioning from heavy fog to clearer night air with visible stars

agents.ego_description: turning left along the castle wall and moving toward the entrance door

entered.detail: dark blue night sky visible above the castle tower
tall stone tower with illuminated windows against the night sky
massive wooden door with intricate carvings and metal studs
large stone planter with dark foliage

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along the castle perimeter, revealing the night sky above a tall gothic tower. The stone fountain falls behind as the path continues along the building facade, with a large ornate door becoming visible in the distance and a stone planter appearing on the right side of the path.

events.description: slowing pace as approaching the entrance threshold
arriving at the large wooden door, filling the frame

agents.ego_description: approaching and arriving at the large ornate door, preparing to enter

entered.detail: ornate wall-mounted lantern illuminating the door archway
stone archway framing the entrance with carved details

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the entrance brings the camera under a stone archway, where the large ornate wooden door dominates the view. The night sky and tower disappear behind as the sheltered porch area comes into focus, with a wall lantern casting warm light on the intricate door carvings as the camera arrives at the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy gothic courtyard that gradually narrows into the sheltered entrance of a castle. It begins by gliding across a cobblestone courtyard past warm ground lanterns, following a character moving toward a distant central fountain. As the camera turns left along the castle perimeter, the fountain recedes and the view opens to a tall gothic tower against the night sky before shifting focus toward a large ornate door and a stone planter. The scene then transitions under a stone archway, where the open sky disappears and the environment closes in around a sheltered porch. Finally, the camera arrives at the threshold, with a wall lantern illuminating the intricate carvings of the massive wooden door.
